PropertyString.name: statSourceType
PropertyString.help: The stat source type describes a set of stats with a common source

PropertyInt.name: id
PropertyInt.help: A unique ID for any CatalogItem that has been defined. Currently only used by IxOS stats

PropertyString.name: statPublisher
PropertyString.help: If an application is publishing stats into catalog remotely, it should put a unique name on all the StatCatalogItems that are created by this application

PropertyNodeList.name: statList
PropertyNodeList.help: List of the properties of the stats available from the stat source

PropertyNodeList.name: statFilterList
PropertyNodeList.help: List of the filters available from the stat source
